basic_details.job_title: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare has released the official Young Professional Notification 2026 on 02-07-2026 at the official website agriwelfare.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Young Professional Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years with a Post Graduate Degree in Agriculture/Agri Business Management/Economics/Statistics/Commerce/Business Administration/Econometrics/Engineering or MBA in Agri. Business can apply online from 02-07-2026 to 15-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online applicat

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Agriculture/ Agri Business Management/ Economics/ Statistics/ Commerce/ Business Administration/ Econometrics/ Engineering or MBA in Agri. Business.
qualification.details: Young Professional: Post Graduate Degree in Agriculture/ Agri Business Management/ Economics/ Statistics/ Commerce/ Business Administration/ Econometrics/ Engineering or MBA in Agri. Business. Experience: Two years of experience in the relevant field (Desirable)

selection_process: Screening of applications Personal interview Short written examination or PowerPoint presentation (may be required)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Young Professional Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Young Professional Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Young Professional position is 15th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Agriculture, Agri Business Management, Economics, Statistics, Commerce, Business Administration, Econometrics, Engineering, or an MBA in Agri. Business.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive an honorarium of Rs. 60,000/- along with a conveyance allowance of Rs. 3,000/-, totaling Rs. 63,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the provided Google Forms link. Please refer to the 'How to Apply' section for detailed instructions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual engagement for the post of Young Professional in the Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Young Professional announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications, followed by a personal interview. A short written examination or PowerPoint presentation may also be required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.
